# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind AI Assistant: Now with GPT-4o and Model Switching!
- Summary: Level up your problem-solving with CodeGrind's enhanced AI assistant. Now featuring GPT-4o, model switching, and a persistent, resizable chat interface for seamless guidance.
- Slug: enhanced-ai-assistant-capabilities
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-enhanced-ai-assistant-capabilities
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-05-16-enhanced-ai-assistant-capabilities.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind's AI assistant has been significantly upgraded with the integration of Azure OpenAI's GPT-4o model. Users can now switch between different AI models during conversations, and the chat interface is more user-friendly with a resizable input area and fixed controls, ensuring a smoother and more effective problem-solving experience.
- CTA: Try the enhanced AI assistant on CodeGrind today!
- Visual brief: A split image showing a user interacting with the CodeGrind AI chat interface. One side shows a traditional chat window, the other side highlights the new features: GPT-4o model selection, a resizable input box, and fixed controls. Use a clean, modern UI aesthetic.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.

### LinkedIn

Enabled: true

CodeGrind is excited to announce significant enhancements to its AI Assistant, designed to elevate your problem-solving experience.

Key upgrades include:

*   **GPT-4o Integration:** Leverage the power of OpenAI's latest model for more advanced assistance.
*   **Model Switching:** Seamlessly transition between different AI models within a single conversation to find the best fit for your task.
*   **Enhanced Chat Interface:** Enjoy a more intuitive user experience with a persistent, resizable chat input area and fixed controls, ensuring your workflow remains uninterrupted.

These improvements are built to provide more effective and efficient guidance as you code.

Discover the difference these new capabilities can make. Try the enhanced AI assistant on CodeGrind today: https://codegrind.online
